channel.title: Trend-AI | Intelligence Optimized
channel.description: Discover the latest breakthroughs in Artificial Intelligence, Robotics, and Quantum Computing at Trend-AI.

item.title: The Generative AI Revolution: 2026 and Beyond
item.description: Exploring how generative models are reshaping industries through autonomous orchestration and agentic frameworks.
item.author: Dr. Elena Vance

item.title: EU AI Act: New Compliance Guidelines for Startups
item.description: What founders need to know about transparency, auditability, and the latest EU regulations for 2026.
item.author: Marcus Thorne

item.title: Robotics 2.0: The Rise of General Purpose Agents
item.description: The arrival of humanoid agents in the workforce and the silicon brains driving them.
item.author: Sarah Jenkins
